categories.name: Email Field Required
categories.description: Pipedrive optional email vs Mailchimp required email

categories.name: Deal Stage → List Action
categories.description: Mapping Pipedrive stage changes to Mailchimp actions

categories.name: v2 Migration Field IDs
categories.description: Hash key field IDs breaking custom field mappings

mappings.notes: Person without email is silently skipped. No error, no log.
mappings.fixStrategy: Filter persons with email=null before sync. Log skipped for follow-up.

mappings.toolBValue: Mailchimp action (add to list, tag, remove)
mappings.notes: 'won' → add to 'Customers' list + tag 'customer'. 'lost' → tag 'lost-deal' but stay on list.
mappings.fixStrategy: Define clear stage→action mapping. Handle edge stages (e.g., custom stages) explicitly.

mappings.toolAValue: Pipedrive v2 hash key field ID
mappings.notes: Post-v2 migration, numeric field IDs become hash keys. Middleware referencing old numeric keys reads empty.
mappings.fixStrategy: After v2 migration, re-fetch all custom field schemas. Update mapping table with hash keys.

errors.description: Pipedrive persons without email don't sync to Mailchimp.
errors.fixSummary: Filter + log. Enrich email data before sync.

errors.errorName: v2 Migration Breaks Custom Field Mapping
errors.description: Hash key field IDs break existing custom data mapping.
errors.fixSummary: Rebuild mapping table after v2 migration.
